zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Hungerford於1511年出生在英國波克夏雷亞丁時，她的父親Sir Anthony Hungerford27歲，母親Lady Jane Darrell21歲。她於大約1524年與Thomas Hankyns在英國格盧斯特斯爾代莫可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1611年8月9日在英國英格蘭波克夏雷亞丁享年100歲，埋葬在英國波克夏雷亞丁聖 勞倫也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Hungerford于1511年出生在英国波克夏雷亞丁时，她的父亲Sir Anthony Hungerford27岁，母亲Lady Jane Darrell21岁。她于大约1524年与Thomas Hankyns在英国格盧斯特斯爾代莫可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1611年8月9日在英国英格兰波克夏雷亞丁享年100岁，埋葬在英国波克夏雷亞丁聖 勞倫也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Hungerford was born in 1511, in Reading, Berkshire, England, her father, Sir Anthony Hungerford, was 27 and her mother, Lady Jane Darrell, was 21. She married Thomas Hankyns about 1524, in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 9 August 1611, in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 100, and was buried in St Laurence's Church, Reading, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Hungerford est née en 1511, à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Anthony Hungerford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Darrell, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Hankyns environ 1524, à Dymock, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1611, à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 100 ans, et a été enterrée à St Laurence's Church, Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Hungerford 1511 in Reading, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Anthony Hungerford 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Jane Darrell 21. Sie hat um 1524 in Dymock, Gloucestershire, England Thomas Hankyns geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 9. August 1611 im Alter von 100 Jahren in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Laurence's Church, Reading, Berkshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Thomas Hankyns circa 1524, nel Dymock, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Anne Hungerfordが1511年にイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングで生まれた時，父Sir Anthony Hungerfordは27歳，母Lady Jane Darrellは21歳であった。約1524年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディモックでThomas Hankynsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1611年8月9日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングで100歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアレアディングスト ラウレンセ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Reading St Lawrence, Reading, Berkshire,: 영국 버크실르 리딩 스트 로렌스'스 처르치
ko.Dymock, Forest of Dean District, Glouce: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Hungerford(이)가 1511년 영국 버크실르 리딩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Anthony Hungerford(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Jane Darrell(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1524년 영국 그루스스터실르 디모크에서 Thomas Hankyns(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1611년 8월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 리딩에서 100세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 리딩 스트 로렌스'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Hungerford nasceu em 1511, em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Anthony Hungerford, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Darrell, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Hankyns aproximadamente 1524, em Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1611, em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 100 anos, e foi sepultada em St Laurence's Church, Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Hungerford родилась в 1511 г. в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Anthony Hungerford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Darrell, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Hankyns около 1524 г. в местности димокк, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 9 августа 1611 г. в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 100 лет и была похоронена в местности ст лоуренсе'с чурч, ридинг, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Hungerford nació en 1511, en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Anthony Hungerford, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Darrell, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas Hankyns aproximadamente 1524, en Dymock, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1611, en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 100 años, y fue sepultada en St Laurence's Church, Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
